Please share:

2) Server console status right now (is it “running” on the panel?)

AI: Yes, it can be server-side. Most common causes: server not fully up/crashed after start, wrong port, or firewall/network/DDoS block.

Please check these on the panel:
1) Is the server status “Running” (not “Starting/Stopped”)?
2) What port is shown for the server, and is Minecraft client using that exact port?
3) Paste the console lines right after you start it (last ~2 minutes).

replies.message:
Thanks for reaching out! I understand your Minecraft server is experiencing lag with around 20 players online.

This usually happens when server resources (like CPU and RAM) are being pushed beyond their limits. Here are a few quick things you can try while we look into this further for you:

Restart the server to clear temporary load
Reduce the number of active plugins/mods if you’re using any
Lower view-distance and simulation-distance settings
Make sure no background processes are consuming resources

In the meantime, I’ve escalated your request to our support team so we can take a closer look and help optimize your setup. We’ll reach out shortly using this email with more specific recommendations.

If you have any additional details (like your server plan or mods installed), feel free to reply here—it’ll help us speed things up.

Thanks for your patience!
thats the problem. basic plan (2gb ram) cannot handle 20 players. for that we recommend atleast 6gb ram
So I have to upgrade the plan again
